title: pgstat — I/O & Buffers (PG16+)
description: pg_stat_io tabanli detayli I/O analizi. backend_type x context kirilimi, hit ratio, eviction, fsync.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

targets.rawSql: select coalesce(sum(reads_delta) * 8192, 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select coalesce(sum(writes_delta) * 8192, 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select coalesce(sum(evictions_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select coalesce(sum(fsyncs_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)

select $__timeGroupAlias(sample_ts, $__interval), backend_type || '/' || context as metric, sum(reads_delta * 8192)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from $__interval::interval), 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1, backend_type, context order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(sample_ts, $__interval), backend_type || '/' || context as metric, sum(writes_delta * 8192)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from $__interval::interval), 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1, backend_type, context order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(sample_ts, $__interval), backend_type as metric, sum(read_time_ms_delta) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1, backend_type order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(sample_ts, $__interval), backend_type as metric, sum(write_time_ms_delta) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1, backend_type order by 1

select backend_type, context, sum(reads_delta) * 8192 as reads_bytes, sum(writes_delta) * 8192 as writes_bytes, sum(extends_delta) * 8192 as extends_bytes, sum(hits_delta) as hits, sum(evictions_delta) as evictions, sum(fsyncs_delta) as fsyncs from fact.pg_io_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by backend_type, context order by reads_bytes desc nulls last limit 30
